update_propagation: new run in run_index updates analysis membership via edges
updated claim edges propagate to question pack claim/report sections
analysis registry status changes propagate to question pack metadata
generation_principle: Question packs are generated strictly from indices and evidence maps
generation_steps: Resolve question_id to analysis_ids and claim_ids
Resolve analysis_ids to run_ids via analysis edges
Resolve claim_ids to report_ids/run_ids via claim edges
Resolve run_ids to runpack paths via run_index
Emit question manifest containing references only
